theScene: You awake with a start, your odd dream slowly fading from your mind. You faintly wonder what it means, but eventually decide it must be a good omen as you shake your head, wondering if you have arrived at your destination, heading up to the deck of the ship you see it's already docked at port.

The elderly captain of the ship is still on board, and she informs you that you've been asleep for about an hour since the ship arrived, she also informs you to head to the guild hall so you can get briefed on the situation, and not to worry about being late. Telling you with a laugh that it's on a first come first serve basis, and this way you'll get to skip any lineups.

With a smile you thank the sea captain and head down the gangplank to the docks, carrying your few belongings you brought with you from the academy, and a small pouch of gold. Despite the rather small size of the town its streets bustle with activity, people coming and going in multiple directions, and you're surprised to spot numerous monster girls mixed in with the humans.

As you look around, trying to get your bearings amidst the hustle and bustle, a well dressed and sultry looking woman approaches you, sensually swaying her hips as she struts forward, her heavy breasts bouncing hypnotically with every step, and still rather disoriented you can't help but be a little thrown off by her sudden appearance.
Well hello there cutie, you must be one of the new adventurers? My name is Vivian von Voss, and it is an absolute {i}pleasure{/i} to meet you.
You manage to not stare at her huge, heavenly breasts and maintain eye contact with her while you introduce yourself.
Mmm,♥ [ThePlayerName]... What a lovely name, I {i}love{/i} it.♥
Your heart flutters at her words and you find yourself smiling at her with a growing flush as she takes a step towards you.
Come with me baby. I'll show you the {i}best{/i} way to pay off your debt.

She gestures for you to follow her, and you feel increasingly light headed and horny as you move closer, it's getting increasingly difficult to not think about her tempting, voluptuous body, but you manage to ask her one question as the two of you start to walk together.
Yes [ThePlayerName], that terrible, {i}horrible{/i} debt from your education at Adventum, so le-

You find yourself unable to stop staring at her incredibly deep cleavage, her bountiful tits completely soaking in every ounce of your scattered focus as you barely manage to mumble out an introduction.

Your heart flutters as she leans forward just enough to make her heavy breasts bounce and show off more of her fascinating valley, her seductive words practically melting your mind with molten arousal, and you find yourself unable to help but smile and nod eagerly with a deep blush.
Follow me baby. You're going to have so much {i}fun{/i} working for me.♥

Your head feels like it's filled with pure heavenly bliss, and all you can think about is how perfect her overflowing, luscious breasts are as you follow next to her in a daze, distantly hearing her mention something about a debt as you start to walk together.
But you just can't bring yourself to stop thoughtlessly staring at her acres of cleavage while you walk with her...
Another woman suddenly bursts between the two of you with a very agitated expression, pushing through the busy crowd with practiced ease.
{i}VIVIAN!{/i} What the {i}hell{/i} do you think you're doing?!
You know it's Guild business to show people around, not yours! Even if he {i}is{/i} late.
Tch, I was just trying to help you out and introduce him to his new life in Lucidia as an adventurer, but I know when my help is clearly not wanted, {i}Elena.{/i}
The pink haze clouding your mind suddenly disappears with the newcomer's outburst, and Vivian huffs and walks away pouting, clearly not interested in an extended argument.

As Vivian struts away you find yourself helplessly staring at her plump rear and wide womanly hips swaying with every step as she storms off, making her voluptuous ass bounce with captivating jiggles that you find yourself lost in the sight of...
Then the other woman snaps her fingers in front of your face a few times and you regain your focus with a start.
You are pretty sure she was talking to you for a while, given the annoyed gaze she's directing at you, but she clears her throat and starts over.
I'm Elena, the guild representative here. You must be [ThePlayerName].
You nod and start to ask her what that was all about, but quickly trail off as a cat girl passes by, recalling the numerous monster girls walking around, an uncommon sight in a human town.

Uhm, don't worry about the monster girls roaming around town, we only let the ones willing to be {i}civil{/i} in, and well, there's also some heroines who... Uhmm... {i}Became{/i} monster girls that live here or visit from time to time...
Elena lets out a tired sigh before she puts on her smile again and starts speaking again.
{i}Anyways.{/i} That woman you just met is Vivian, she runs the local inn, and tavern, 'The Goddess' Embrace'...
It's also a monster girl bordello... Actually it's more accurate to say that it's a human bordello {i}for{/i} monster girls...
She looks at you with no small measure of annoyance and disgust, though it doesn't seem to be really directed at you.
I would {i}highly{/i} recommend you {i}don't{/i} work there.
She lets out an exhausted sigh before perking back up and continuing.

But don't let that stop you from sleeping at the inn or eating and drinking at the tavern. The inn is free to stay at for adventurers, and the food and drink there is actually pretty great, if not the best in town.
She clears her throat, shifting her tone to one much more serious and business like as she gets back on track.
I'm sure Vivian already mentioned your debt. So we may as well get all of the bad news out of the way now.
You know that 'free' adventuring school you attended? It wasn't {i}exactly{/i} free. You're currently in debt for one million eros.
It's the currency in Lucidia. Any money you brought along with you will be worthless here, but I can take what you have and exchange it for eros.
We at the Adventurers' Guild are also obligated to give you a small amount of money to help start off your quest on top of whatever money you brought.
You cautiously hand her your pouch of gold, and after counting it for a brief moment she hands you a small sack of shining purple coins. You received 1000 eros!

Now I'm sure you may be wondering how exactly the {i}free{/i} adventuring school wasn't free. While your schooling itself is free, your trip here was not, nor were any meals on the trip over, or at the school. In addition, any elective classes you took were also factored into the debt, as well as the school's expected returns on your income as an adventurer based on your grades, and some of the starting gear I'll be giving you shortly.
I know... But I'm just with the guild here and don't make the rules. We just help facilitate quests and the debt repayment.

I would also like to mention you cannot leave Lucidia until you have either paid off your debt entirely, or defeated the Demon Queen. The boats can't ferry you back due to their contract with the guilds and schools, as well as aquatic monster girls destroying boats trying to carry men away from Lucidia, you may have noticed the crew was all female.
And to top all of that off, most... well, actually, {i}all{/i} of your training you had at Adventum is effectively worthless here.

Well, no violence can happen on Lucidia due to a continent-wide enchantment placed by the Demon Queen, and as such, any fancy sword fighting techniques or destructive magic you learned are now completely useless for defeating monster girls, or even sparring with humans.

You had a course during your first year at Adventum on 'Sexual Defence from Monster Girls', right? Well, that will be your most valuable asset here, as the only way to fight here, is to fight... sexually.
Elena practically spits out the last words with very thinly veiled contempt before putting back on her professional smile.
That, or talking to them, but most monster girls would rather have sex than a pleasant conversation. You could also just run away all the time and find alternative ways past obstacles I suppose...
Elena sighs thoughtfully while you try to process all of the information being thrown at you.
She gently pats your shoulder with a reassuring smile.
No [ThePlayerName], you aren't. I know all of this is very overwhelming, but it will be okay, I promise.
Just... Don't let the option of having sex with countless monster girls get to your head.
Her hand slips away and she gives you a slightly judging look while you continue to try and process everything.
I don't know, everything still feels kind of dreamy?

Oh, that's just the way Lucidia is thanks to that enchantment placed by the Demon Queen. You'll get used to it eventually, but the short version of it is that it's a bit disorienting for humans to travel here normally. I mean, records say it was always a bit weird and time can be weirdly fickle in some places too, but the enchantment made it far worse.

For example a left turn you take in a forest could suddenly leave you back where you started, or suddenly in a mountain cave surrounded by monsters. But this does bring me to my first bit of good news.
She hands you a fancy looking leather-bound book and a small stone with blue runes engraved on it.
Here is your grimoire of guidance and your recall stone. Don't lose them. Please.
Well, {i}yes,{/i} it would add to your debt, but more importantly, you might not be able to get back to town without them, let me explain.

The grimoire will allow you to navigate Lucidia with ease, it keeps the twisting dream-like portions of the continent stable and traversable, and its pages will magically fill themselves as you adventure. While the recall stone will bring you back to town, it only activates if it detects you are exhausted or in severe danger.
There will also sometimes be quests posted at the Adventurers' Guild, which will automatically be added to your grimoire, including quests you may be given by people outside of town.

But if you want to defeat the Demon Queen you will need to acquire the five different sigils from four different dungeons across the continent, each controlled by a different one of the Demon Queen's commanders.
But before you head out there you should go and buy some equipment and learn some skills. Almost anyone in town can teach you, but the Adventurers' Guild is the best place for it.
So you should go and get yourself prepared for adventuring! Going out there unprepared... Well, it probably won't end well...

Well I think I've kept you here long enough, if you have any more questions, come talk to me in the Adventurers' Guild and I'll try my best to answer them. I'd recommend you at least go to the shopping district and guild hall before heading out adventuring, and I hope we can get along despite all of this. Good luck!
She quickly heads into the guild office and leaves you to your own devices.
